calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-27-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on for Default Prove Up
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Yvonne Lee
Appearances:
Benjamin Duranske, Esq. For Plaintiff Andrew Dumke, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: Andrew Dumke and against the defendant: Logicware, LLC
As follows:
Principal $50,000.00
Costs of $388.00
Interest of $16,187,26
For the total of $66,575.26
Plaintiff to bring a motion for attorney fees
Judgment signed in open court.
